items.title: Reusable Modules
items.description: CLI tools are thin wrappers over reusable modules; the same logic powers both interactive use and the command line.

items.title: pyproject Packaging
items.description: `[project.scripts]` in `pyproject.toml` is how a Python function becomes an installed command on PATH.

items.title: src Layout
items.description: CLI modules sit inside the `src/<pkg>/` tree and are reached after installation, like any other module.

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: CLIs route operational messages through `logging` (stderr) and reserve stdout for results.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: End-to-end CLI behaviour (argv, stdout, exit codes) is naturally an integration-level test.
